# Ripretinib 相關新聞

[← 返回新聞總覽]({{ '/news/' | relative_url }})

---

<p class="key-answer" data-question="Ripretinib 有什麼相關新聞？">
<strong>Ripretinib</strong> 目前有 <strong>18 則</strong>相關新聞報導，預測適應症 20 個。
</p>

<div class="key-takeaway">
本頁整合 Ripretinib 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。
</div>

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Qinlock is indicated for the treatment of adult patients with advanced gastrointestinal stromal tumour (GIST) who have received prior treatment with three or more kinase inhibitors, including...</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（20 個）：<ul>
<li>multiple endocrine neoplasia（98.8%）</li>
<li>HER2 positive breast carcinoma（98.3%）</li>
<li>malignant catarrh（98.3%）</li>
<li>infectious bovine rhinotracheitis（98.3%）</li>
<li>cytomegalovirus infection（98.2%）</li>
<li>amenorrhea (disease)（97.8%）</li>
<li>progesterone-receptor negative breast cancer（97.6%）</li>
<li>normal breast-like subtype of breast carcinoma（97.6%）</li>
<li>progesterone-receptor positive breast cancer（97.6%）</li>
<li>breast tumor luminal A or B（97.5%）</li>
<li>thrombocytopenia（97.1%）</li>
<li>marcothrombocytopenia with mitral valve insufficiency（97.1%）</li>
<li>hereditary thrombocytopenia with normal platelets（97.1%）</li>
<li>transient neonatal thrombocytopenia（97.0%）</li>
<li>dense granule disease（97.0%）</li>
<li>pulmonary hypertension（96.8%）</li>
<li>kyphoscoliotic heart disease（96.8%）</li>
<li>homozygous familial hypercholesterolemia（96.8%）</li>
<li>amyotrophic lateral sclerosis（96.6%）</li>
<li>axial spondylometaphyseal dysplasia（96.4%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>
<p><a href="{{ '/drugs/ripretinib/' | relative_url }}">查看完整藥物報告 →</a></p>
</div>
